data.title: Airlines hike fares amid swinging oil prices, jet fuel shortage fears
data.description: Airlines across Asia raise fares and fuel surcharges amid volatile oil prices and fears of jet fuel shortages.
data.content:
Airlines around Asia are increasing fares and hiking fuel surcharges as the Iran war sends oil prices swinging wildly and stokes fears of jet fuel shortages if the conflict worsens.
